def negative_flask_debug_mode_in_production_code():
    rule_id = "flask_debug_mode_in_production_code"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flask code enables debug=True in application runtime paths."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
